metadata.title: Enterprise — AI Automation at Scale for Your Organization
metadata.description: Billix Enterprise delivers AI-powered automation, team collaboration, and advanced security for large organizations. Scale your workflows with 500+ integrations and dedicated support.
metadata.ogTitle: Enterprise — AI Automation at Scale | Billix
metadata.ogDescription: AI-powered automation, team collaboration, and advanced security for large organizations.

hero.title: One AI platform for every team automation made <serif>simple for everyone</serif>
hero.description: Billix replaces disconnected tools with a unified AI workspace where teams can chat, automate, create content, handle files, and execute cross-platform tasks — all through natural conversation. No technical experience needed. No flow builders. No complex setup. Just point, speak, and Billix handles the execution.

values.title: Your team's All-in-One AI Workspace for <serif>Workflows and Content</serif>
values.description: Billix unifies communication, automation, and content creation in a single AI workspace. Teams can chat, automate tasks, manage files, and execute actions across tools — all through natural language. No setup, no flow builders, no technical experience needed.

statistics.title: AI employees built to <serif>do work</serif>, not just talk about it.
statistics.description: Expand your team's capacity and boost efficiency with AI employees that deliver measurable business impact

productivity.title: More Productive teams
productivity.description: Type or speak your request in natural language. Billix understands your intent and plans the workflow automatically.

savings.title: Savings compared to hiring
savings.description: Connects to 10,000+ apps — Gmail, Notion, Slack, and more. Handles tasks end-to-end with no setup, triggers, or flow diagrams.

revenue.title: higher revenue per employee
revenue.description: Track your tasks in real-time, get updates, and access everything later—fully searchable and stored for reference.
